selection_criteria.ranking_formula: ((0.4 × rating/5) + (0.2 × log(reviews)/5) + (0.2 × log(photos)/3) + (0.2 × keyword_bonus) + (0.15 × photo_limit_bonus)) × tourist_penalty × sport_priority_penalty × core_sport_bonus
selection_criteria.tourist_attraction_penalty: 15% penalty (0.85x) for tourist_attraction or park without identified_sports
selection_criteria.core_sport_bonus: 15% bonus (1.15x) for facilities with core sports: basketball, baseball, football, soccer, volleyball, track & field
